meaning: n.平衡,均衡,姿势,镇静,砝码vt.使平衡,使悬着,保持...姿势vi.平衡,悬着,准备好,犹豫
examples: What amazed him even more than her appearance was her poise.
To be a successful fashion model, a guy needs to be more than just a looker. He has to have confidence, poise and a sense of style.
A Pickpocket Needs Poise, Patience And panache.
This version dislocates us, as spectators, heightening our sense of upward movement and precarious poise.
I'm competing in this category, which judges women based on their figure, body tone and poise.
